name: Pineapple Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons unflavored gelatin mixed with water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup sugar with pineapple juice and slightly beaten egg yolks.
2. Cook over very low heat until sugar is completely dissolved and custard coats the spoon. Do not allow to boil; just simmer.
3. Stir continuously while cooking.
4. Add gelatin mixture to hot custard and keep over low heat, stirring constantly, until completely melted.
5. Remove from heat and pour into a large bowl.
6. Add strained crushed pineapple to hot custard and blend well.
7. Beat egg whites until they just cling to the bowl, then add another 1/2 cup sugar; beat only until blended.
8. Pour egg whites, all at once, into hot custard and fold until well blended.
9. Pour into cold baked pie shell. Let stand until cool, then put in refrigerator for several hours until chilled.
10. Beat 1 cup whipping cream and spread over the pie.
